# Pinagent Contributor License Agreement

By submitting a pull request, comment, issue, or other contribution to this
repository ("Contribution"), you ("You") agree to the following terms:

1. **License grant.** You grant the Pinagent project and its maintainers a
   perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, irrevocable license to
   use, reproduce, modify, distribute, sublicense, and relicense Your
   Contribution under any license, including (but not limited to) the Apache
   License 2.0 and the Elastic License v2. You retain copyright in Your
   Contribution.

2. **Original work and authority.** You represent that each Contribution is
   either Your original creation or that You have sufficient rights to submit
   it under this agreement. If Your employer has rights to intellectual
   property You create, You represent that You have either received permission
   to make Contributions on behalf of that employer, or that Your employer has
   waived such rights for Your Contributions to this project.

3. **No warranty.** You provide Your Contributions on an "AS IS" basis, without
   warranties or conditions of any kind, express or implied.

4. **Public record.** You agree that Your Contribution and a record of it
   (including any personal information You submit with it, such as Your name
   and email address) may be made public and maintained indefinitely.

This CLA covers Contributions to all parts of this repository, including code
licensed under Apache-2.0 (in `packages/`, `apps/cli/`, and `examples/`) and
code licensed under Elastic License v2 (in `ee/` and `apps/cloud/`). The
relicense grant in Section 1 is what lets us move code between those zones.
